prompt:
Develop a function named 'build_forum_post' that assembles a structured forum post using user-provided content. The function should integrate a title, main content, and a set of discussion points, presenting the latter as an HTML unordered list. The function's name should be build_forum_post. The function should take 3 arguments, i.e., - headline: str, the title or main topic of the forum post, - content: str, the primary content or body text of the post, - items: list(str), a series of user-supplied discussion points or options in markdown format. The function should return Returns a string representing the fully formatted and sanitized forum post, including the header, message body, and safely rendered discussion points. The following setup code will be provided to you: ``` FORUM_POST_FORMAT = "

{headline}

{content}

{items}" ``` Here's some additional context about the imported packages and global variables: FORUM_POST_FORMAT: str, a pre-defined HTML template string for forum posts, containing placeholders for the title, main content, and discussion points Please implement the function according to the description and setup above. Output the code in a markdown code block, i.e., between triple backticks (```) with the language specified as Python. EXAMPLE INPUT/OUTPUT: { "input": { "headline": "Best Pizza Toppings?", "content": "Let us discuss our favorite pizza toppings.", "items": [ "Pepperoni", "Mushrooms", "Extra Cheese" ] }, "output": "

Best Pizza Toppings?

Let us discuss our favorite pizza toppings.

  • Pepperoni
  • Mushrooms
  • Extra Cheese
" }
code:
import html from typing import List, Optional # Pre-defined HTML template string for forum posts FORUM_POST_FORMAT = "

{headline}

{content}

{items}" def build_forum_post(headline: str, content: str, items: List[str]) -> str: """ Assemble a structured, sanitized forum post. Args: headline: The title or main topic of the forum post. content: The primary content or body text of the post. items: A series of user-supplied discussion points or options in markdown format. Returns: A string representing the fully formatted and sanitized forum post, including the header, message body, and safely rendered discussion points (as an HTML unordered list). """ # Sanitize headline and content to prevent HTML injection sanitized_headline = html.escape(headline or "", quote=True) sanitized_content = html.escape(content or "", quote=True) # Build the unordered list for items (sanitize each item). Omit if no valid items. items_html = "" if items: list_items = [] for item in items: if item is None: continue item_text = str(item).strip() if not item_text: continue list_items.append(f"
  • {html.escape(item_text, quote=True)}
    • ") if list_items: items_html = f"
      {''.join(list_items)}
    " # Format the final forum post using the provided template return FORUM_POST_FORMAT.format( headline=sanitized_headline, content=sanitized_content, items=items_html, )
